## Feature Comparison

| Feature | Our Solution | Competitor A | Competitor B | Competitor C |
|---------|--------------|--------------|--------------|--------------|
| [Feature 1] | ✅ [Better/Unique] | ✅ Has | ❌ No | ⚠️ Basic |
| [Feature 2] | ✅ [Description] | ⚠️ Limited | ✅ Has | ❌ No |
| [Feature 3] | ✅ Unique | ❌ No | ❌ No | ❌ No |
| [Feature 4] | ✅ Has | ✅ Has | ✅ Has | ✅ Has |
| **Pricing** | [Our pricing] | [Their pricing] | [Their pricing] | [Their pricing] |

**Legend**:
- ✅ = Full feature
- ⚠️ = Limited/Basic version
- ❌ = Not available

## Feature Prioritization

Based on competitive analysis:

### Must-Have (Table Stakes)
Features that all competitors have - we need these to compete:
- [Feature 1]: [Why it's table stakes]
- [Feature 2]: [Why it's table stakes]

### Should-Have (Differentiation)
Features that differentiate us from competitors:
- [Feature 1]: [Our unique approach]
- [Feature 2]: [Our unique approach]

### Could-Have (Future Advantage)
Features for future releases to maintain competitive edge:
- [Feature 1]: [Future opportunity]
- [Feature 2]: [Future opportunity]

### Won't-Have (Out of Scope)
Features competitors have but we're deliberately excluding:
- [Feature 1]: [Why we're not including]
- [Feature 2]: [Why we're not including]
